name: No One Left Behind
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: That's My Favorite Uncle!
granted_abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, allies within (r)2" gain a Familia token.

granted_abilities.name: Bulletstorm
granted_abilities.text: Enemy models engaged with this model receive a (-) when resisting (gun) actions.

granted_abilities.name: Call It a Day
granted_abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it must either drain a (soulstone) or discard a Hermanos de Armas upgrade.

extraction_notes: Upgrade belongs to Hermanos de Armas faction based on header
Limitations section shows a single dash '-' indicating no limitations
Card grants three passive abilities, no actions
